text:
find . -name "*h" -exec egrep "_IO(R|W|WR)\(" {} /dev/null \; | wc
    1716   10762  139454

1036 of those use a struct

And using different structs

find . -name "*h" -exec egrep "_IO(R|W|WR)\(" {} /dev/null \; | grep struct | sed 's/.*struct//' | sed 's/).*//' | sort -u | wc    
     538     539    8235
